## Summary

Describe the change and why it helps Angular AI frontend developers.

## Type

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] UI improvement

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, .env files, or private data

- [ ] No fake stars, metrics, or testimonials
